<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
before = last_transition.before_frame
after = last_transition.after_frame

b_nodes = {n['hash']: n for n in before.segmentation['nodes']}
a_nodes = {n['hash']: n for n in after.segmentation['nodes']}

changed = []
for h in b_nodes:
    if h in a_nodes:
        if b_nodes[h]['boundary != a_nodes[h]['boundary']:
            changed.append(('moved', h))
    elif h not in a_nodes:
        changed.append(('gone', h))
for h in a_nodes:
    if h not in b_nodes:
        changed.append(('new', h))
print("Changes:", changed)
print("Result:", last_action_result)
action(['LEFT'])
</parameter>
</function>
